nodes.label: Mixed test anchoring convention
nodes.rationale: Use data-testid for new anchors while preserving load-bearing functional ids such as snip-* that application logic already depends on.

nodes.label: Pinned GitHub Actions
nodes.rationale: Pin actions to commit SHA to prevent compromised floating tags from controlling CI runners.

nodes.label: Two-phase placeholder swap
nodes.rationale: Keep rendered compare HTML out of the outer Markdown parse so blank lines inside code samples cannot terminate CommonMark HTML blocks.

Current and full PDF export modes
Diagram JSON, PNG, and deep-link workflow
